goal: Build a twin-pallet feeder: 6 cubes from one conveyor split between TWO pallets — cubes 1-3 to PalletA (left), cubes 4-6 to PalletB (right). Demonstrates drop_targets dispatching to multiple distinct destinations (not just one pallet's grid).
thoughts:
Six twin-pallet specifics for CP-19 (extends CP-08 — drop_targets pattern with multiple destinations):
1) 2 pallets at y=-0.4: PalletA at x=-0.35, PalletB at x=+0.35. Each 0.20×0.20m (smaller than CP-08's single 30×30cm because we have 2 pallets fitting side-by-side).
2) 6 cubes on conveyor at x=[-1.4, -1.15, -0.9, -0.65, -0.4, -0.15]. drop_targets dispatches first 3 to PalletA grid, last 3 to PalletB grid.
3) PalletA grid (3 slots): Cubes 1-3 at xy {(-0.42, -0.40), (-0.35, -0.40), (-0.28, -0.40)} all z=0.825.
4) PalletB grid (3 slots): Cubes 4-6 at xy {(0.28, -0.40), (0.35, -0.40), (0.42, -0.40)} all z=0.825.
5) Slots within-pallet spaced 0.07m (0.05 cube + 0.02 gap). Both pallets are 20cm wide — 3 cubes fit linearly.
6) destination_path is set to PalletA (used for fall-through if drop_targets miss; in practice all 6 are mapped explicitly).
code:
# DomeLight + Ground + Cell + Table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    position=[0.0, 0.4, 0.78],
    size=[3.0, 0.4, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.2, 0, 0],
)

# 6 cubes on conveyor at 0.25m spacing
for i, x in enumerate([-1.4, -1.15, -0.9, -0.65, -0.4, -0.15]):
    path = f"/World/Cube_{i+1}"
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=[x, 0.4, 0.835], size=0.05)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=[f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(6)],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
for path in [f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(6)]:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

# Two pallets
create_prim(prim_path="/World/PalletA", prim_type="Cube", position=[-0.35, -0.4, 0.775], scale=[0.10, 0.10, 0.025])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/PalletA", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/PalletB", prim_type="Cube", position=[ 0.35, -0.4, 0.775], scale=[0.10, 0.10, 0.025])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/PalletB", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[0.4, 0.4, 0.835], size=[0.06, 0.06, 0.06])

# drop_targets — first 3 to PalletA, last 3 to PalletB. Each 3-cube row spaced 0.07m.
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    source_paths=[f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(6)],
    destination_path="/World/PalletA",
    drop_targets={
        "/World/Cube_1": [-0.42, -0.40, 0.825],
        "/World/Cube_2": [-0.35, -0.40, 0.825],
        "/World/Cube_3": [-0.28, -0.40, 0.825],
        "/World/Cube_4": [ 0.28, -0.40, 0.825],
        "/World/Cube_5": [ 0.35, -0.40, 0.825],
        "/World/Cube_6": [ 0.42, -0.40, 0.825],
    },
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/ConveyorBelt", "/World/PalletA", "/World/PalletB"],
)
extension_notes: CP-19 demonstrates that drop_targets can dispatch to multiple distinct destinations within a single controller install — not all cubes need to go to the same pallet/bin. Useful for fan-out/distribution scenarios. Future variant: 4 pallets in cardinal directions, color-coded routing.
failure_modes: PalletA + PalletB too close — cube transit between pallets may collide. Used 0.7m apart (PalletA at x=-0.35, PalletB at x=+0.35). Within Franka's 0.85m reach diagonally.
drop_targets entry missing for any source_paths cube — falls through to destination_path (PalletA). All 6 mapped explicitly here.
PalletB at x=+0.35, distance from robot (0,0): sqrt(0.35^2+0.4^2) = 0.53m. Within reach.
Verify_args has 2 stages but they're independent (same robot, different bin) — verify_pickplace_pipeline checks each stage's reach + bridge separately.
verified_status: build-spec-2026-04-XX; form-gate ✓; function-gate ✓ (multi-cube cube_paths + Mode A 3-strike fix)
code_template:
# DomeLight + Ground + Cell + Table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name={{primary_robot.class}},
    dest_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    position={{primary_robot.position}},
    orientation={{primary_robot.orientation}},
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path={{input_conveyor.path}},
    position={{input_conveyor.position}},
    size={{input_conveyor.size}},
    surface_velocity={{input_conveyor.surface_velocity}},
)

# 6 cubes on conveyor at 0.25m spacing
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[0].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[1].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[2].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[3].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[3].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[3].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[4].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[4].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[4].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[5].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[5].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[5].path}}, schema_name=api)

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}, {{workpieces[3].path}}, {{workpieces[4].path}}, {{workpieces[5].path}}],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
for path in [{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}, {{workpieces[3].path}}, {{workpieces[4].path}}, {{workpieces[5].path}}]:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

# Two pallets
create_prim(prim_path={{pallet_a.path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{pallet_a.position}}, scale={{pallet_a.scale}})
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{pallet_a.path}}, schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path={{pallet_b.path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{pallet_b.position}}, scale={{pallet_b.scale}})
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{pallet_b.path}}, schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}}, position={{pick_sensor.position}}, size={{pick_sensor.size}})

# drop_targets — first 3 to PalletA, last 3 to PalletB. Each 3-cube row spaced 0.07m.
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}},
    belt_path={{input_conveyor.path}},
    source_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}, {{workpieces[3].path}}, {{workpieces[4].path}}, {{workpieces[5].path}}],
    destination_path={{pallet_a.path}},
    drop_targets={
        {{workpieces[0].path}}: {{workpieces[0].drop_target}},
        {{workpieces[1].path}}: {{workpieces[1].drop_target}},
        {{workpieces[2].path}}: {{workpieces[2].drop_target}},
        {{workpieces[3].path}}: {{workpieces[3].drop_target}},
        {{workpieces[4].path}}: {{workpieces[4].drop_target}},
        {{workpieces[5].path}}: {{workpieces[5].drop_target}},
    },
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", {{input_conveyor.path}}, {{pallet_a.path}}, {{pallet_b.path}}],
)
